1000640932.english: Nya ha ha, Poi will win the 'battle'. Even Master is impressed by the way Poi fights.
1000640932.korean: 냐하핫, '전투'는 포이가 이기겠지. 포이가 싸우는 모습을 보고 주인님도 감탄하실 정도니까.

1000640935.english: Want to make a bet with Poi? Poi is betting you'll be pinned down by your master and wailing during this vacation~
1000640935.korean: 뭣하면 포이랑 내기할까? 포이는 이번 휴가 내에 네가 주인님한테 깔려서 울부짖는다에 한 표~

1000640936.english: Alright. I'll bet that human will acknowledge and serve this Lady Draculina.
1000640936.korean: 좋아. 나는 그 인간이 이 드라큐리나 님을 인정하고 섬기게 된다에 걸겠어.

1000640937.english: Okay, okay. If you win, Poi will serve under your command instead of your master.
1000640937.korean: 그래, 그래. 만약에 네가 이기면 포이는 주인님이 아니라 네 소속으로 수발을 들게.

1000640938.english: Since your victory condition is for your master to serve you, I’m sure he’ll let you get away with this much. What do you think?
1000640938.korean: 네 승리 조건이 주인님이 널 섬기게 되는 거니까, 이정도는 허락해 주실거야. 어때?

1000640942.english: For Poi, seeing you being violated by your master is the reward in itself.
1000640942.korean: 포이는 주인님한테 유린당하는 네 모습을 보는 것 자체가 보상이니까.

1000640945.english: Say what you just said again!

1000640947.english: This must also be a trial given to me by the Savior.

1000640948.english: You, you...! If you don't come down from the tree right now, I'll blow you all away!
1000640948.korean: 너, 너어...! 당장 나무에서 안 내려오면 다 날려버릴거야!

1000640949.english: Nya ha ha ha ha ha~

1000640951.english: On the beach where the event was in full swing, I examined the panels with my arms full of food given to me by the team members at every stop.
1000640951.korean: - 행사가 한창인 해변, 들르는 곳마다 대원들이 준 먹거리를 양팔 가득 안고 패널을 살폈다.

1000640952.english: There were so many people that all we could do was briefly try things out, look around, and chat... but thankfully, the members told me that they were happy with just that.
1000640952.korean: - 워낙 많아서 잠깐 체험이나 구경을 하고, 이야기를 나누는 것이 전부지만... 고맙게도 대원들은 나에게 그것만으로도 기쁘다고 말해주었다.

1000640953.english: Although it was not their first time taking a summer vacation, the team members showed an enthusiastic reaction that exceeded expectations at the fact that they were spending the vacation they wanted.
1000640953.korean: - 여름 휴가를 보내는 건 처음이 아니지만, 스스로 원하는 휴가를 보낸다는 것에 대원들은 예상을 뛰어넘는 열광적인 반응을 보여줬다.

1000640954.english: Besides, our team members aren't ordinary humans, but bioroids. Staying up all night is no problem for them...
1000640954.korean: - 거기다 우리 대원들은 평범한 인간이 아닌 바이오로이드. 하루 밤을 새는 것 정도는 멀쩡하니까...

1000640955.english: I wondered when a day became 36 hours long. The panelist's schedule was packed with various events.
1000640955.korean: - 언제부터 하루가 36시간이 된 건지. 패널의 일정표에는 각종 행사가 빼곡하게 적혀 있었다.

1000640956.english: And now, although it is a welcome break amidst that packed schedule, I am actually troubled.
1000640956.korean: - 그리고 지금은 그 빼곡한 일정 가운데에 단비같은 휴식 시간이지만, 정작 나는 고민에 빠졌다.

1000640957.english: As I scanned the panel, I recalled the conversation I had with Veronica.
1000640957.korean: - 패널을 슥슥 훑어보다 베로니카와 나누었던 이야기가 떠올랐다.

1000640958.english: Since they are usually short-handed, the members of the Kohei unit who receive volunteer support must be having a hard time.
1000640958.korean: - 안그래도 평소에 일손이 부족해 자원봉사 지원을 받는 코헤이 대원들이 고생을 하고 있겠지.

1000640959.english: Since I have some spare time, shall I go help out?

1000640961.english: - We returned to the Orca, which was anchored away from the beach.
1000640961.korean: - 해변과 떨어진 곳에 정박한 오르카호로 돌아왔다.

1000640962.english: In the auditorium to be used as a chapel, only a few members were making preparations, and the angels were nowhere to be seen.
1000640962.korean: - 예배당으로 쓰일 강당엔 몇몇 대원들이 준비를 하고 있을 뿐, 천사들의 모습은 보이지 않았다.

1000640963.english: Just in case, I headed to Azazel's room, and shortly after, I could feel the commotion even in the hallway.
1000640963.korean: - 혹시나 싶어 아자젤의 방으로 향하고 나서 얼마 후, 복도까지 소란스러움이 느껴졌다.

1000640964.english: When I opened the door, the surroundings were filled with sweet snacks and pamphlets to be used for the event. They were adorned with cute illustrations, perhaps with children in mind as well.
1000640964.korean: - 문을 열어보니 주변에 달콤한 간식과 행사에 쓰일 팜플렛이 가득했다. 아이들도 염두했는지 아기자기한 그림이 새겨져있었다.

1000640965.english: - And in the middle of that...

1000640967.korean: 제, 제 얘기 좀 들어 주세요...!

1000640970.english: The explanation of the situation is...

1000640971.english: This time, Azazel was hanging from Saraqael's waist.
1000640971.korean: - 이번에는 아자젤이 사라카엘의 허리에 매달려 있었다.

1000640972.english: Then, could you please wait just a moment? It will be finished soon.
1000640972.korean: 그럼 조금만 기다려주시겠습니까. 금방 끝날 테니까요.

1000640973.english: At Veronica's suggestion, I quietly slipped into the room.
1000640973.korean: - 베로니카의 권유에 슬쩍 방 안으로 들어왔다.

1000640974.english: The two angels are continuing their argument, unaware that I have arrived.
1000640974.korean: - 두 천사님은 내가 온 줄도 모르고 설전을 계속하고 있다.

1000640975.english: To think that the angel of the religious order would gather believers with food.

1000640977.english: Aaaah, don't throw it! The cookie will break!

1000640979.english: We continued to watch the temple of the two angels while sharing the cookies offered by Veronica, who had caught the package that flew in amidst the chaos.
1000640979.korean: - 난리통에 날아온 꾸러미를 받아낸 베로니카가 권한 쿠키를 나눠먹으며 두 천사의 성전을 계속 지켜봤다.

1000640980.english: On a special day like today, it would be nice if non-believers could enjoy it too...!
1000640980.korean: 오늘 같이 특별한 날에 신도가 아닌 분들도 같이 즐기면 좋잖아요...!

1000640981.english: And taking this opportunity, I also want to share the Savior's will with those who are not yet believers-
1000640981.korean: 그리고 이번 기회에 아직 신도가 아닌 분들께도 구원자의 뜻을-

1000640982.english: Shouldn't we be conveying the will of the light, not acting as a savior!
1000640982.korean: 구원자가 아니라 빛의 뜻을 알려야 할 것 아닌가!

1000640983.english: I received help from the kitchen staff.

1000640984.english: And look at those impious ones wandering around outside.
1000640984.korean: 그리고 밖을 돌아다니는 저 불경한 자들을 보라.

1000640985.english: I usually turn a blind eye, but I cannot just let the doctrine be disturbed on such a sacred day!
1000640985.korean: 평소에는 눈감아 줬지만, 이런 신성한 날에 교리를 어지럽히는 꼴을 그냥 놔둘 수는 없다!

1000640986.english: That's because it's a swimsuit— Eek!

1000640987.english: Surprisingly, one of the important doctrines of the Kohei sect is not to wear underwear.
1000640987.korean: - 놀랍게도 코헤이 교단의 중요한 교리 중 하나는 속옷을 입지 말라는 것.

1000640988.english: The reason given is that covering one's private parts makes it easy for lust to arise, but I didn't know even swimsuits wouldn't be allowed.
1000640988.korean: - 치부를 가리면 음욕이 피어나기 쉽기 때문이라는 이유이기는 하지만, 수영복까지 안 될 줄은 몰랐네.

1000640989.english: It would depend on how you interpret the doctrine, but...

1000640990.english: - As I nodded in agreement with Veronica, my gaze naturally drifted to her legs.
1000640990.korean: - 베로니카에게 동의하며 고개를 끄덕이다 저절로 시선이 베로니카의 다리로 향했다.

1000640992.english: - As the nominal savior of the Kohei Sect, I’m dying to see if Veronica actually adheres to the original doctrine in her daily life, but it looks like I’ll have to put that off until next time.
1000640992.korean: - 명목상 코헤이 교단의 구원자로서, 베로니카가 평소에는 원래 교리를 충실히 지키는지 확인해보고 싶은 마음은 굴뚝같지만 이번에도 다음을 기약해야할 것 같다.

1000640993.english: Veronica's tight-fitting, wide-open nun's habit caught the eye.
1000640993.korean: - 착 달라붙는, 크게 트인 베로니카의 수녀복이 시선을 사로잡았다.

1000640994.english: I let it slide last time, but that doesn't mean my curiosity has disappeared.
1000640994.korean: - 저번에는 그냥 넘어가고 말았지만 내 호기심이 사라진 건 아니다.

1000640995.english: - I wonder if Veronica... usually faithfully observes the original doctrine?
1000640995.korean: - 과연 베로니카는... 평소에는 원래의 교리를 충실히 지킬까?

1000640996.english: For now, there are no traces of underwear visible on the exposed parts. However...
1000640996.korean: - 일단 드러난 부분에는 속옷의 흔적이 보이지 않는다. 하지만...

1000640997.english: I am now very aware that there are so... so many different kinds of women's underwear.
1000640997.korean: - 지금의 난, 여성의 속옷에는 아주... 아주아주 많은 종류가 있다는 것을 너무나 잘 알고 있다.

1000640999.english: Veronica let out a small sigh.

1000641000.english: - Just as I was wondering if I was about to get an earful, Veronica’s hand unexpectedly moved slowly toward the hem of her habit.
1000641000.korean: - 한 소리 들으려나 하고 생각한 순간, 뜻밖에도 베로니카의 손이 천천히 수녀복 자락으로 향했다.

1000641001.english: Veronica's white fingers, gripping the hem, began to pull the long skirt up slowly, very slowly.
1000641001.korean: - 옷자락을 붙잡은 베로니카의 하얀 손가락이 천천히, 아주 천천히 긴 옷자락을 끌어올리기 시작했다.

1000641002.english: - Ankles, calves, thighs. As the area of ​​white skin contrasting with the neat black nun's habit widens, the voices of Azazel and Saraqael, who are arguing, grow further and further away.
1000641002.korean: - 발목, 종아리, 허벅지. 정갈한 검은 수녀복과 대비되는 하얀 살결의 면적이 넓어질수록, 설전을 벌이는 아자젤과 사라카엘의 목소리가 점점 멀어진다.

1000641004.english: - As I unconsciously swallowed, a faint smile touched Veronica’s lips.
1000641004.korean: - 무심코 침을 꿀꺽 삼키자 베로니카의 입가에 희미한 미소가 맺혔다.

1000641005.english: The legs, always hidden by the nun's habit, were fully revealed, and just before my curiosity was finally satisfied.
1000641005.korean: - 늘 수녀복에 가려져 있던 다리가 전부 드러나고, 마침내 내 호기심이 해결되기 직전.

1000641006.english: The nun's habit that had rolled up rustled back down to its original position.
1000641006.korean: - 말려 올라갔던 수녀복이 사르륵, 다시 원래 위치로 내려왔다.

1000641007.english: It is not desirable to doubt the faith of the Inquisitor, Savior.
1000641007.korean: 이단심문관의 신앙을 의심하시는 것은 바람직한 일이 아닙니다, 구원자님.

1000641008.english: I came back to reality at Veronica's voice whispering softly in my ear.
1000641008.korean: - 귓가에 나지막히 속삭이는 베로니카의 목소리에 정신이 다시 현실로 돌아왔다.

1000641012.english: To think they planned a heretical gathering during the period of the Holy Light!
1000641012.korean: 신성한 빛내림 기간에 이단의 집회를 계획하다니!

1000641013.english: And in such an outfit full of lust! How lewd!
1000641013.korean: 그것도 저런 음욕이 가득한 복장으로! 이 어찌 음란한가!

1000641014.english: S-Savior... How could you come into my room without saying a word...!
1000641014.korean: 구, 구원자... 말도 없이 방에 들어오면 어떡해요...!

1000641015.english: Please rest assured. I have already cleared away everything dangerous.
1000641015.korean: 안심하십시오. 위험한 건 제가 미리 다 치워놨습니다.

1000641017.english: To think the Savior, who should be listening to the Word of Light more than anyone else, is behaving like this...!
1000641017.korean: 누구보다도 빛의 말씀을 경청해야할 구원자가 이런 작태라니...!

1000641019.english: Wait a minute! That's not the Savior's fault!
1000641019.korean: 잠깐만요! 그건 구원자가 잘못한 게 아니에요!

1000641021.english: Would you like some chocolate as well?

1000641022.english: It looks like today is going to be a bit long... Oh, right.
1000641022.korean: - 오늘은 아무래도 좀 길어질 것 같은데... 아, 그렇지.

1000641023.english: So that is why you came to find me. Thank you for the Savior's mercy.
1000641023.korean: 그래서 찾아오신 거군요. 구원자님의 자비에 감사를.

1000641025.english: There are quite a few believers who help with the work.

1000641026.english: And Lord Azazel does not want to burden the Savior.
1000641026.korean: 그리고 아자젤님은 구원자님께 부담을 드리고 싶지 않으십니다.

1000641027.english: After all, the receiving position and the giving position are different.
1000641027.korean: 받는 입장과 주는 입장은 다른 법이니까요.

1000641028.english: This is especially true when the recipient harbors romantic feelings for the giver.
1000641028.korean: 받는 이가 주는 이에게 연정을 품고 있을 경우에는 특히 그러합니다.

1000641029.english: I guess I should say, "As expected of an angel..." Azazel's thoughtfulness warms a corner of my heart.
1000641029.korean: - 역시 천사님... 이라고 해야하나. 아자젤의 마음씀씀이에 가슴 한 구석이 따뜻해진다.

1000641030.english: Savior, please do not worry and enjoy your vacation until the main event of the Lightfall.
1000641030.korean: 구원자님은 걱정 마시고, 빛내림의 본 행사까지 휴가를 즐겨주십시오.

1000641032.english: Veronica trailed off and glanced back at the two angels.
1000641032.korean: - 베로니카가 말을 흐리며 두 천사를 슬쩍 돌아보았다.

1000641033.english: I will make sure to handle it somehow. Just like usual.

1000641034.english: I left Azazel's room and was about to go outside when I headed toward the captain's quarters.
1000641034.korean: - 아자젤의 방을 나와 밖으로 나가려다 함장실로 방향을 잡았다.

1000641035.english: - Since I have free time anyway... I guess I should get some work done for a bit.
1000641035.korean: - 어차피 비는 시간이었으니... 잠깐 일이나 해야겠군.

1000641037.english: Are you okay? Shall I carry your luggage?

1000641038.english: Ugh... No, it's okay... This much is...

1000641040.english: Someone belonging to the Jinjo army... Oh my... Hey, showing weakness is shameful!
1000641040.korean: 진조의 군세에 속한 자가... 하악... 야, 약한 모습을 보이는 건 수치!

1000641043.english: Are you okay? Can I help you?

1000641044.english: ... For an eternity... Hmph... the life I've lived... Jim...

1000641046.english: Give it here, I'll carry it. Um...

1000641047.english: But the original plan was only to explore this far... Tachi, right?
1000641047.korean: 그런데 원래 계획은 여기까지만 탐험하는 거였는데... 타치, 맞아?

1000641048.english: That's right. The plan the master approved goes this far.

1000641049.english: Wait until you have the master's permission.

1000641050.english: Whew. Whew. Whew. To control the soul of the deceased with both hands... As expected, it's Jim's roaring sword. You're quite skilled!
1000641050.korean: 후.후.후. 두 손으로 망자의 영혼을 조종하다니. 역시 짐의 울부짖는 검. 상당한 실력이구나!

1000641051.english: You just did ventriloquism with a doll, didn't you?

1000641052.english: Ahem. However, for a journey for the sake of my family, hesitation is...
1000641052.korean: 크흠. 그러나 짐의 권속을 위한 여행에 망설임이란-

1000641054.english: Hee, hee-it...?! Hey, why are you drawing your sword?
1000641054.korean: 히, 히잇...?! 거, 검은 왜 뽑는 것이냐?

1000641056.english: It's a journey to find the treasure for the commander, isn't it? You shouldn't fight each other!
1000641056.korean: 사령관님한테 드릴 보물을 찾는 여행이잖아. 서로 싸우는 건 안 돼!

1000641059.english: This journey is an adventure for the kin of the True Ancestor, the commander of the Orca, and the master of the Howling Sword.
1000641059.korean: 이번 여행은 진조의 권속이자, 오르카호의 사령관이자, 울부짖는 검의 마스터를 위한 모험.

1000641060.english: The goal is to find a treasure that will please my retainers! Behold! This treasure map I have brought!
1000641060.korean: 권속이 기뻐할 보물을 찾는 게 목적이지! 보아라! 짐이 가져온 이 보물지도를!

1000641061.english: Wow! What's going on? What's going on? Was there something like that?
1000641061.korean: 우와! 뭐야, 뭐야? 그런 게 있었어?

1000641063.english: Huh? Isn't this what LRL was drawing before bed yesterday?
1000641063.korean: 어? 이거 어제 LRL이 자기 전에 그리던 거 아냐?

1000641065.english: ...I-I have received a revelation. A revelation that the legendary treasure lies here!
1000641065.korean: ...지, 짐은 계시를 받았노라. 이곳에 전설의 보물이 있다는 계시를!

1000641066.english: Do not doubt the princess of the True Ancestors! Are you ready to follow me, my servants?
1000641066.korean: 진조의 프린세스를 의심하지 말 지어니! 나를 따를 준비는 되었는가, 사역마들이여!

1000641067.english: I'll follow, I'll follow! You have lots of chocolate too, right?

1000641073.english: Hey guys, the commander said to contact him whenever he goes somewhere.
1000641073.korean: 얘들아, 사령관이 어디 갈 때 연락하랬잖아.

1000641074.english: ... I don't like it when it's dark.

1000641076.english: Wowwww...! It's incredibly beautiful... It must be connected to the sea!

1000641078.english: ... How about it, familiars! Isn't it beautiful!

1000641079.english: Okay! Should I ask the commander to come too?

1000641081.english: [... A treasure the master will love.

1000641082.english: Uh...? It's dangerous to act alone.

1000641083.english: And Tachi, you came with me to oversee the management, didn't you...?
1000641083.korean: 그리고 타치, 넌 나랑 같이 관리감독하러 온 거잖아...

1000641084.english: My sword, where do you wander alone!

1000641086.english: Tachi must have found it. Let's go too!

1000641087.english: I will accept that opinion, the generous burden.

1000641090.english: Oh, that wasn't it. The white beast is coming!
1000641090.korean: 아, 이게 아니었지. 하얀 야수가 간다앗!

1000641092.english: ... Phew. I understand why the commander asked me.
1000641092.korean: ...휴. 사령관이 나한테 부탁한다고 했던 이유를 알겠어.

1000641100.english: A statue depicting a human...? But the composition...

1000641102.english: [I tripped over a rock and fell.]

1000641103.english: They seem surprised by the altar. As a vassal serving the master, this is an unacceptable disgrace.
1000641103.korean: [제단을 보고 놀란 듯하다. 마스터를 모시는 가신으로서 용인할 수 없는 추태.]

1000641104.english: LRL, are you okay? Are you hurt?

1000641106.korean: 여기에 왜 이런 게 있는 거야...

1000641107.english: That's right, there's no treasure, just a bunch of weird stuff.
1000641107.korean: 맞아, 보물은 없고 이상한 것만 잔뜩이야.

1000641108.english: That thing behind the statue looks similar to the Kohei sect decoration.
1000641108.korean: 동상 뒤에 있는 저건 코헤이 교단 장식이랑 비슷하게 생겼네.

1000641109.english: But something... It seems a little different. What do you think, Tachi?
1000641109.korean: 하지만 뭔가... 조금 다른 것 같아. 타치는 어떻게 생각해?

1000641111.english: Oh, Tachi has never participated in religious ceremonies.
1000641111.korean: 아, 타치는 종교행사에 참여한 적이 없지.

1000641112.english: I really hope you'll participate at least once. The commander often stops by too.
1000641112.korean: 꼭 한 번 참여했으면 좋겠다. 사령관도 종종 들르거든.

1000641114.english: Yeah. I came last week too.

1000641115.english: [... I'll consider it. But investigating this is the priority.

1000641117.english: ... Tachi, are you used to this kind of thing?

1000641118.english: [I was born into a secret society and raised as a tool for assassination.]
1000641118.korean: [나는 비밀집단에서 태어나 암살에 사용하는 도구로 길러졌다.]

1000641119.english: I've seen actual murder scenes many times. However.]

1000641121.english: [I've never seen it expressed as a statue before.]

1000641122.english: That's right, these statues seem to symboLise something.
1000641122.korean: 맞아, 이 동상들은 무언가를 상징하는 것 같아.

1000641123.english: What could it be? And why...?

1000641124.english: Hmm, hmm. If you're finished with your business, let's head back quickly.
1000641124.korean: 흐, 흐음. 용무가 끝났으면 어서 돌아가도록 하자.

1000641125.english: So, even here, the thousand-year treasure couldn't be found...
1000641125.korean: 결국 이곳에서도 천년의 보물은 찾을 수 없었는가...

1000641127.english: Scary, scary! The king of vampires who has lived for a thousand years, the princess of the True Ancestors, is just-
1000641127.korean: 무, 무섭다니! 천년의 세월을 살아온 흡혈귀의 왕, 진조의 프린세스가 고작-

1000641137.english: Are you familiar with this kind of thing?

1000641138.english: It's not as scary as being trapped in a coal mine.

1000641139.english: And what does this mean...? It feels uneasy.
1000641139.korean: 그리고 이게 뭘 뜻하는 건지... 꺼림칙해.

1000641141.english: There are no special devices on the statue.

1000641142.english: I think that symbol is the same way. It was just plugged in normally.
1000641142.korean: 저 상징도 마찬가지인 것 같아. 그냥 평범하게 꽂혀 있었어.

1000641143.english: First, let's take a picture... Is there anything I can take?
1000641143.korean: 일단 사진을 찍어두고... 가져갈 수 있는 건 없을까?

1000641144.english: You should pack things that won't hinder your movement.

1000641147.english: The denominational emblem is engraved on the badge. It's exactly the same as the pattern carved on that statue.
1000641147.korean: 휘장에 교단 문양이 새겨져있어. 저 동상에 새겨진 모양이랑 똑같아.

1000641148.english: I hope it's just an unnecessary worry...

1000641149.english: It doesn't matter what crisis comes.

1000641151.english: Huh? Did you just say that yourself? I'm hearing Tachi's real voice for the first time.
1000641151.korean: 어? 지금 직접 말한 거야? 타치의 진짜 목소리는 처음 들어봐.

1000641153.english: I received a panel with a photo of the cave altar that the kids said they discovered.
1000641153.korean: - 꼬마들이 발견했다는 동굴 제단 사진을 패널로 받아 봤다.

1000641154.english: A statue that highlights only the cruel side of humanity, and the symbol of the Kohei sect...
1000641154.korean: - 인간의 잔혹한 면만 부각시킨 동상과, 코헤이 교단의 상징이라...

1000641155.english: A pattern similar to the badge Azazel gave me is engraved on the emblem the children brought. There are slight differences, but the basic style was the same.
1000641155.korean: - 아자젤이 내게 줬던 뱃지와 비슷한 문양이 아이들이 가져온 휘장에 새겨져 있다. 약간의 차이점은 있지만 기본적인 양식은 똑같았다.

1000641156.english: I thought there would be something left since there is a branch of the Kohei Order nearby, but considering what Dutch Girl said, it weighs on my mind somehow.
1000641156.korean: - 근처에 코헤이 교단의 지부가 있으니 무언가는 남아 있을 거라고 생각했지만, 더치걸의 말도 그렇고 어쩐지 마음에 걸린다.

1000641157.english: I just came back out to the shore, but I decided to return to the Orca.
1000641157.korean: - 방금 다시 해안에 나왔지만, 다시 오르카 호로 돌아가기로 했다.

1000641159.english: This is... the emblem of the Kohei Order.

1000641161.english: That belongs to a consecrated high priest, too.

1000641162.english: But... looking at the condition, it seems like it was made very recently. On top of that...
1000641162.korean: 그런데... 상태를 보니 굉장히 최근에 만들어진 것 같다. 거기다...

1000641163.english: Yes. No matter how long it takes, I don't think it has been more than a month since it was built and consecrated.
1000641163.korean: 네. 아무리 길어도 만들어지고 축성받은지 한 달은 넘지 않은 것 같아요.

1000641164.english: As in Cerestia's case, there is a good chance that this could happen.
1000641164.korean: 세레스티아 님의 사례처럼, 그럴 가능성은 충분합니다.

1000641165.english: However, according to aerial reconnaissance data, the branch was clearly in ruins.
1000641165.korean: 다만, 항공 정찰 자료에 따르면 분명 지부는 폐허가 되어 있었습니다.

1000641166.english: So, it seems there are believers hiding somewhere who are carrying on the will of the light.
1000641166.korean: 어딘가에 숨어서 빛의 뜻을 이어가는 신도들이 있는 것이로군요.

1000641167.english: - When I handed her the photo of the altar I’d received from the Dutch Girl, Sarakael frowned.
1000641167.korean: - 더치걸에게 받은 제단을 찍은 사진을 건네주자, 사라카엘이 눈을 찌푸렸다.

1000641168.english: A statue of humans fighting each other.

1000641169.english: And it looks as if... the light is judging them.
1000641169.korean: 그리고 마치... 빛이 그들을 심판하는 것처럼 보이는군.

1000641171.english: The Light is a being who forgives and saves humans...

1000641172.english: It is confirmed that there are survivors in the order. Those candles appear to have been used recently.
1000641172.korean: 교단에 생존자가 있다는 건 확실해졌군요. 저 초들은 사용한지 얼마 안된 것 같습니다.

1000641173.english: ...and they are apostates who dared to defile the name of the light.
1000641173.korean: ...그리고 그들은, 감히 빛의 이름을 더럽힌 배교자들이다.

1000641175.english: Please take a good look at that symbol, Savior.

1000641176.english: - Veronica pointed at the photo in place of Azazel, who was looking down with a sad expression.
1000641176.korean: - 슬픈 얼굴로 눈을 내리까는 아자젤을 대신해 베로니카가 사진을 가리켰다.

1000641177.english: There is an unknown mark on the denomination's symbol, of which only the lower half remains.
1000641177.korean: 아래쪽 절반만 남은 교단의 상징 위에, 알 수 없는 표식이 있습니다.

1000641178.english: I don't know yet what that symbolizes, but its meaning is clear.
1000641178.korean: 저것이 무엇을 상징하는지는 아직 모르겠지만, 뜻하는 바는 명백합니다.

1000641179.english: That is correct. It means that the denomination's meaning of light is wrong, and instead, they follow something else.
1000641179.korean: 그렇다. 교단의, 빛의 뜻은 틀렸고, 그 대신 다른 것을 따른다는 뜻이지.

1000641181.english: As the two said, the swirling symbol appeared to reign over the half-remaining order.
1000641181.korean: - 둘의 말대로, 소용돌이 모양의 상징은 반만 남은 교단 위에 군림하는 것처럼 보였다.

1000641182.english: I guess this wasn't the time to be preparing for the light rays.

1000641183.english: I will go to judge those apostates.

1000641185.english: This is different from the pranks so far, Azazel.

1000641186.english: No matter how much you are a Seraphim of the Order...

1000641187.english: No one has the authority to stop me, the Judge Saraqael.
1000641187.korean: 나, 심판자 사라카엘을 막을 권한은 어디에도 없다.

1000641189.english: Before you pass judgment, I will persuade them to return to the light and the embrace of the Savior.
1000641189.korean: 당신이 심판을 내리기 전에, 제가 그들을 설득해 다시 빛과 구원자의 품으로 돌아오도록 설득하겠어요.

1000641191.english: …”The human heart is fragile and easily stained by darkness, so I shall give it the opportunity to regain the radiance of light.”
1000641191.korean: ..."인간의 마음은 연약해 쉬이 어둠에 물드니, 빛의 광명을 되찾을 기회를 주리라."

1000641192.english: You wouldn't say you don't know, Judge.

1000641195.english: I stared blankly at Azazel and Saraqael, who were completely different from usual, before coming back to my senses.
1000641195.korean: - 평소와는 180도 다른 아자젤과 사라카엘의 모습을 넋놓고 바라보다 다시 정신을 차렸다.

1000641196.english: I'm sorry. I think we'll have to postpone our promise to go to the branch together for a while...
1000641196.korean: 죄송해요. 같이 지부에 가자는 약속은 조금 미뤄야될 것 같은데...

1000641197.english: I... I will definitely keep my promise, even if it's later...

1000641201.english: Please go without worry. I will finish the preparations for the event.
1000641201.korean: 걱정 말고 다녀오십시오. 행사 준비는 제가 마저 진행하겠습니다.

1000641202.english: What? Then the preparations for 'Lightfall' are...

1000641204.english: It would be good to make that a tradition going forward.
1000641204.korean: 앞으로는 그걸 전통으로 삼는 것도 좋겠습니다.

1000641205.english: Hehe. Blessings on the path ahead, Savior.

1000641206.english: Then I will take your permission and head to the branch, Savior.
1000641206.korean: 그럼 허락한 것으로 알고 지부로 향하겠다, 구원자.

1000641208.english: If it is a branch of the order, there must surely be scriptures containing the Word of Light.
1000641208.korean: 교단의 지부라면 분명 빛의 말씀이 기록된 경전이 있을테지.

1000641209.english: After judging the apostates, I will bring the scriptures over and reveal in detail whether you are the true savior.
1000641209.korean: 배교자들을 심판한 후에, 그 경전을 옮겨와서 네가 진정한 구원자가 맞는지 낱낱히 밝혀내겠다.

1000641210.english: I thought things had been quiet lately, but it turns out they hadn't given up yet...
1000641210.korean: - 요새 좀 잠잠하다 싶었더니, 아직 포기한 게 아니었구나...

1000641212.english: Azazel, who had been trailing off and glancing around to see if Saraqael had left, lifted slightly.
1000641212.korean: - 말끝을 흐리며 사라카엘이 나갔는지 눈치를 살피던 아자젤의 몸이 살짝 떠올랐다.

1000641215.english: Azazel lightly kissed my cheek, blushed, and disappeared out the door.
1000641215.korean: - 내 볼에 살짝 입을 맞춘 아자젤은 얼굴을 붉히며 문 밖으로 사라졌다.

1000641217.english: Startled by the sudden voice, I turned around.
1000641217.korean: - 갑자기 들려온 목소리에 깜짝 놀라 뒤를 돌아보았다.

1000641220.english: - As she said that, Azaz looked a little tired for some reason.
1000641220.korean: - 그렇게 말하는 아자즈는 어쩐지 조금 피곤해 보였다.

1000641222.english: - Muttering as if it were someone else’s business, Azaz fell deep in thought.
1000641222.korean: - 마치 남일처럼 중얼거리며 아자즈는 골똘히 생각에 잠겼다.

1000641224.english: Before I could even react, Azaz's golden suit thudded to the floor.
1000641224.korean: - 내가 미처 반응하기도 전에 아자즈의 금빛 슈트가 툭 하고 바닥에 떨어졌다.

1000641226.english: How is it? This is the outfit I got from Audrey to participate in the Muscle Queen competition.
1000641226.korean: 어떤가요? 머슬퀸 대회에 참가하려고 오드리 씨에게 받아온 의상이에요.

1000641227.english: - Just how far does this girl have to go to surprise me before she’s satisfied...?
1000641227.korean: - 이 아가씨는 대체 어디까지 날 놀라게 해야 직성이 풀리는 걸까...?

1000641228.english: Oh, did that surprise you? I figured you wouldn't mind since you see me so often.
1000641228.korean: 어머, 놀랐나요? 사령관은 많이 보니까 신경 안 쓸 거라고 생각했어요.

1000641229.english: Hehe, sorry. Next time, I'll tell you in advance before taking it off.
1000641229.korean: 후후, 미안해요. 다음부터는 미리 말하고 벗을게요.

1000641230.english: No. If I talk back any further, I'll get completely caught up in their pace.
1000641230.korean: - 안 돼. 여기서 더 대꾸했다간 완전히 페이스에 말리고 만다.

1000641231.english: That's right. Would you like to touch it?

1000641233.english: I've shown it to the commander, so I'll go back now.

1000641234.english: Yawn... I guess I got a little carried away doing something I've never done before.
1000641234.korean: 하암... 안 해본 일을 했더니 잠깐 들떴었나봐요.

1000641235.english: I felt a strange mix of emotions at the remark that they were just leaving since I had shown them the clothes. To think such a bland reaction...
1000641235.korean: - 옷을 보여줬으니 그냥 돌아간다는 말에 미묘한 기분이 들었다. 이런 담백한 반응이라니...

1000641236.english: By the way, I missed the angels on my way in. Where are you going?
1000641236.korean: 그런데 들어오면서 천사님들하고 엇갈렸는데, 어디 가시는 건가요?

1000641237.english: Oh, sorry. I have something to take a moment to attend to, so I'll be going now...
1000641237.korean: 아, 미안해요. 잠깐 볼일이 생겨서 이만...

1000641238.english: While I stood there in confusion, Azaz disappeared out the door.
1000641238.korean: - 내가 황망히 서있는 사이, 아자즈는 문밖으로 사라져버렸다.

1000641241.english: Seeing Azaz answer with a faint smile, I lost the energy to even reply.
1000641241.korean: - 빙긋 웃으며 대답한 아자즈의 모습에 대꾸할 기력도 사라져 버렸다.

1000641242.english: Oh my, is it not possible by any chance?

1000641244.english: I was overwhelmed by extreme fatigue after exchanging just a few words.
1000641244.korean: - 말 몇마디 나눴을 뿐인데 극심한 피로감이 나를 덮친다.

1000641245.english: - Since I have a promise, I guess I should use the remaining time to prepare for the light beam.
1000641245.korean: - 약속한 게 있으니, 남는 시간은 빛내림 준비를 해야겠군.

1000641247.english: Why is that human running around without even resting!
1000641247.korean: 인간 걔는 왜 쉬지도 않고 돌아다니는 거야!

1000641248.english: Every time I hear where it is and go, it isn't here. When I go, it isn't here again.
1000641248.korean: 어디 있다는 이야기를 듣고 갈 때마다 여기 없습니다. 가면 또 여기 없습니다.

1000641249.english: Are they even resting... I really don't know what they're thinking.
1000641249.korean: 쉬기는 하는 건가... 진짜 무슨 생각인지 모르겠네.

1000641250.english: So next is... Ugh, why is this submarine so big again—
1000641250.korean: 그래서 다음이... 으으, 이 잠수함은 또 왜 이렇게 큰 거-

1000641253.english: I'm sorry, I didn't see it.

1000641255.english: ...Hmph, fine. I'll forgive you, so go on your way.
1000641255.korean: ...흥, 됐어. 용서해 줄 테니까 가던 길 가.

1000641264.english: Why do you keep following me?

1000641265.english: I am on my way to meet my master.

1000641267.english: It would be nice to be together forever, but I don't think it would be bad to be faithful to this moment.
1000641267.korean: 영원을 함께하는 것도 좋지만, 이 순간에 충실한 것도 나쁘지 않을 것 같아서요.

1000641271.english: Could you help me for a moment? The Commander said I can't do it alone. I'll make sure to reward you handsomely.
1000641271.korean: 잠깐 저 좀 도와주실래요? 사령관이 혼자서는 안 된다고 했거든요. 사례는 톡톡히 할게요.

1000641274.english: Why is this one so strong again?
1000641274.korean: 얘도 또 힘이 왜 이렇게 세?

1000641275.english: Let go of me! I never said I'd help!
1000641275.korean: 이거 놔! 난 도와준다고 한 적 없어!

1000641276.english: You said you wanted to perform last time, right?

1000641277.english: What? That's for a much bigger stage than theirs...
1000641277.korean: 뭐? 그건 걔들보다 훨씬 커다란 무대에서나...

1000641278.english: I will make it the size of an island for you later.
1000641278.korean: 나중에 제가 섬 하나 크기로 만들어 드릴게요.

1000641279.english: How could you... No, I think you could do that.
1000641279.korean: 그걸 네가 어떻게... 아니, 너라면 그럴 수 있을 것 같아.

1000641280.english: Hehe, then that's it, right? Let's go.

1000641281.english: No, listen to me until I finish! I have something urgent to do!
1000641281.korean: 아니, 말 좀 끝까지 들어! 바쁜 일이 있다고!

1000641282.english: That's right. I need to meet my master soon, too.
1000641282.korean: 맞습니다. 저도 주인님이랑 빨리 만나봐야 해요.

1000641283.english: After all, the time we can spend with our living Master is limited to the time He is alive.
1000641283.korean: 살아계신 주인님과 함께할 수 있는 시간은 주인님이 살아계시는 동안으로 한정되어 있으니까요.

1000641284.english: How can you say something so chilling...

1000641287.english: It feels like a half-life, doesn't it?

1000641289.english: In that case, I can give you a better suggestion.
1000641289.korean: 그렇다면 제가 더 나은 제안을 드릴 수 있어요.

1000641290.english: Here is the door lock ordered by the Commander. It was specially designed so that no one can enter at night. Only the Commander and I know the password.
1000641290.korean: 여기, 사령관이 주문한 도어락이에요. 야밤에 누가 들어올 수 없게 특별히 설계됐죠. 비밀번호는 저랑 사령관밖에 모르구요.

1000641291.english: I’ll tell you this specially, just for you, Eternity. How about it? You could be alone with the Commander.
1000641291.korean: 이터니티 씨한테만 특별히 알려드릴게요. 어때요? 사령관과 단 둘이 있을 수 있는데.

1000641293.english: You're quick to decide! No, more importantly, I never said I was going—
1000641293.korean: 판단 빨라! 아니, 그것보다 나는 간다고 한 적이-

1000641294.english: And what are you going to do!

1000641295.english: Hehe, I guess I can get a new part.
1000641295.korean: 후후, 새로운 부품을 얻을 수 있겠네요.

1000641297.english: This is driving me crazy, seriously!

1000641303.english: No matter how much Saraqael-nim searches for the scriptures, they won't be able to harm the Savior-nim.
1000641303.korean: 아무리 사라카엘님이 경전을 찾아 내더라도, 구원자님에게 해를 끼치지는 못할 겁니다.

1000641304.english: Oh, no, not that. Of course, that's also a concern, but...
1000641304.korean: 아, 아니, 그거 말구요. 물론 그것도 걱정되지만...

1000641305.english: You mean the believers who will stay at the branch?

1000641306.english: I think we should go and see the situation first.
1000641306.korean: 일단 가서 상황을 봐야할 것 같습니다.

1000641307.english: It certainly seems their beliefs are twisted.
1000641307.korean: 그들의 믿음이 뒤틀렸다는 것은 틀림없어 보입니다만.

1000641308.english: ... Veronica, are you planning to judge them too?

1000641309.english: That's what I would have done in the past.

1000641311.english: As Azazel-nim mentioned earlier, they can still be saved.
1000641311.korean: 아까 아자젤님이 말씀하셨던 것처럼, 그들은 아직 구원받을 수 있습니다.

1000641312.english: Just like I found true faith after meeting the Savior.
1000641312.korean: 제가 구원자님을 만나 진정한 믿음을 찾은 것처럼요.

1000641313.english: Heh heh, yes. I will also try, so please guide the followers back to the right path.
1000641313.korean: 후후, 네. 저도 노력할 테니까, 신도들을 올바른 길로 되돌려요.

1000641314.english: However, if they refuse to follow the Savior's will...
1000641314.korean: 다만, 그들이 구원자님의 뜻을 따르기를 거부한다면...

1000641319.english: But the fog around here is...

1000641324.english: It didn't occur naturally. This is dazzling our eyes.
1000641324.korean: 자연적으로 발생한 것이 아니다. 이것이 우리의 눈을 현혹하고 있군.

1000641325.english: It seems like it's using the refraction and scattering of light to create a completely different image.
1000641325.korean: 빛의 굴절과 산란을 이용해 전혀 다른 상을 맺히게 하는 모양이군요.

1000641326.english: That's right. It seems you've been so captivated by the savior that you've forgotten your main job.
1000641326.korean: 그렇다. 구원자에게 홀려 본업까지 잊은 건 아닌 모양이로군.

1000641327.english: Because the inquisitor must not be deceived.

1000641328.english: ... But it's too quiet. Is there no one here?

1000641329.english: The security system seems to be functioning normally, so there's definitely someone inside.
1000641329.korean: 경비 체계는 정상적으로 관리되고 있는 것으로 보아, 안에 분명 누군가가 있습니다.

1000641330.english: Either way, we'll know once we go in. I'll take the lead.
1000641330.korean: 어느 쪽이든 들어가 보면 알겠지. 앞장서겠다.

1000641331.english: Just a moment, the security turret is-

1000641334.english: The church's security system wouldn't react to us, angels, would it?
1000641334.korean: 교단의 경비 체계가 천사인 우리에게 반응할 리가 없지 않나.

1000641335.english: Try to emulate the interrogator, even just a little bit.

1000641337.english: Huh? But why has it become so soft?

1000641338.english: Your corruption and the church's will naturally be resolved if you find the scriptures and expose the sins of the fraudster who claims to be the savior.
1000641338.korean: 너와 교단의 타락은 경전을 찾아내서 구원자라는 사기꾼의 죄를 낱낱히 밝혀내면 자연히 해결될거다.

1000641339.english: Right now, this... The apostates come first.

1000641340.english: Then I'll go. No matter how many apostates have taken hold, this is the sanctuary of the church.
1000641340.korean: 그럼 가지. 아무리 배교자들이 자리잡았다고 한들, 이곳은 교단의 성역.

1000641341.english: I hope no angel has forgotten the doctrine that no angel can fly in the sanctuary.
1000641341.korean: 그 어떤 천사도 성역에서 비행할 수 없다는 교리를 잊지 않았기를 바란다.

1000641347.english: Foaming is... It's not doing it.

1000641348.english: Are those guns pointed at us right now...?
1000641348.korean: 지금 총구가 저희한테 향한 거 맞죠...?

1000641351.english: You might want to stay on your toes, just in case.
1000641351.korean: 혹시 모르니 긴장하고 계시는 게 좋겠습니다.

1000641352.english: As long as Azazel doesn't act like a total goofball as usual, she'll be a big help.
1000641352.korean: 아자젤 님은 평소처럼 헬렐레하지만 않으면 충분히 도움이 되니까요.

1000641356.english: To think a place like this was hidden away...

1000641357.english: The fog is thicker on the inside.

1000641359.english: That one is done properly, too. It is a figure holding up and praising the light.
1000641359.korean: 저건 또 제대로 되어있군. 빛을 받들고 찬양하는 형상이다.

1000641360.english: It is not recorded in any of the denomination's records.

1000641361.english: If it is a symbol like that, it should definitely be designated as a top-tier sanctuary...
1000641361.korean: 저런 상징이라면 분명 특급 성역으로 지정되어 있어야 하는데...

1000641362.english: In that case, we can assume it was built during the gap between the annihilation of the old order and the coming of the Savior.
1000641362.korean: 그렇다면 옛 교단의 전멸과, 구원자님의 강림 사이의 공백기에 지어졌다고 생각할 수 있겠습니다.

1000641365.english: There is no answer to be found by merely engaging in armchair theorizing like this.
1000641365.korean: 이렇게 탁상공론만 나누고 있어봐야 답은 나오지 않는다.

1000641366.english: I sense someone approaching from ahead. I will capture the traitor and interrogate her.
1000641366.korean: 앞에서 인기척이 느껴지는군. 배교자를 붙잡아 심문하겠다.

1000641369.english: All creatures in this world right now will ask for your opinion before doing anything.
1000641369.korean: 지금 이 세상의 모든 피조물은 어떠한 것을 행하기에 앞서 당신의 의사를 물을 겁니다.

1000641370.english: As the days go by, your greatness and holiness are renewed, and our inadequacy...
1000641370.korean: 날이 갈수록 당신의 위대함과 거룩함이 새로워, 아직도 저희의 부족함이...

1000641371.english: Apostate, lift your head and pay homage to the Judge.

1000641373.english: ...I realized that there is much. Please, with the hearts of a father and mother, bestow your boundless grace upon us-
1000641373.korean: ...많다는 걸 깨달았습니다. 부디 아버지, 어머니의 심정으로 한량없는 은혜를 저희에게-

1000641379.english: This person blasphemously committed the sin of denying the angel of the order.
1000641379.korean: 이 자는 불경하게도 교단의 천사를 부정하는 죄를 범했다.

1000641381.english: She was in the middle of praying, after all. She’s a very devout believer, so she probably didn’t have time to think about anything else.
1000641381.korean: 기, 기도중이었잖아요. 아주 독실한 신도라, 다른 곳에 신경쓸 틈이 없었을 거예요.

1000641382.korean: 자, 일어나세요, 길 잃은 어린 양이여.

1000641383.english: I am Azazel, a Seraphim of the Order. I have come to guide you to the Savior who has descended into this world.
1000641383.korean: 저는 교단의 치품천사 아자젤. 그대를 현세에 강림한 구원자에게 인도하기 위해 왔습니다.

1000641384.english: Let us realize the Savior's will in this world together.
1000641384.korean: 함께 구원자의 의지를 이 세상에 실현하도록 하죠.

1000641385.english: It is not the will of the Savior, but the will of the Light, Azazel.
1000641385.korean: 구원자의 의지가 아니라 빛의 의지다, 아자젤.

1000641386.english: Please... please let me off a little...

1000641388.english: Grant it to us. Today, that day has come...
1000641388.korean: 저희들에게 베푸소서. 오늘, 그 날이 찾아왔으니...

1000641391.english: Look closely. This is the miserable end of an apostate.
1000641391.korean: 똑똑히 보아라. 이것이 배교자의 비참한 말로다.

1000641393.english: I will find the person in charge of this place.

1000641394.english: I will track down that man, hold her accountable for her crimes, and punish her, thereby restoring the will of the Light throughout the world.
1000641394.korean: 그자를 찾아 죄를 묻고 벌하여, 만 천하에 빛의 뜻을 다시 세우겠다.

1000641395.english: I went around and looked around.

1000641396.english: All the houses were empty, and I met a few believers on the street... and they are all in the same state as this believer.
1000641396.korean: 집은 전부 비어있었고, 길에서 몇몇 신도들을 만나봤는데... 전부 이 신도와 같은 상태입니다.

1000641397.english: She looks a little nervous, but I can sense her deep faith.
1000641397.korean: 조금 불안해보이긴 하지만, 깊은 믿음이 느껴져요.

1000641398.english: Their faith has not changed, Sarah.

1000641399.english: You never know. If that unwavering, deep faith turns toward the wrong path, there would be nothing more sacrilegious than that.
1000641399.korean: 그건 모르는 일이지. 그 흔들리지 않는 깊은 신앙이 잘못된 곳으로 향한다면, 그보다 더 불경한 일은 없을 것이다.

1000641401.english: All the other believers were inside the building. They were sitting in small groups, praying, without paying any attention even when I entered.
1000641401.korean: 다른 신도들은 전부 건물 안에 있었습니다. 제가 들어가도 신경쓰지 않은 채, 삼삼오오 모여 앉아 기도를 올리고 있더군요.

1000641402.english: This is strange. I must move quickly... What is this?

1000641403.english: It's an Iron Bug! Where did it come from?

1000641404.english: The iron horde defiling the sanctuary...!

1000641405.english: You shall receive the wrath of the judge!

1000641409.english: The Apostle... The Apostle of Light...!

1000641410.english: The Iron Bug is an apostle of light.

1000641412.english: ......Azazel. Do you realize what you just did?
1000641412.korean: ......아자젤. 지금 네가 무슨 행동을 했는지, 알고 있나?

1000641414.english: You interfered with the summary judgment handed down by the judge of the order to the one who insulted the light.
1000641414.korean: 너는 빛을 모욕한 자에게 교단의 심판관이 내리는 즉결심판을 방해했다.

1000641416.english: Although called a believer, this person is also a bioroid.

1000641417.english: They might not be able to distinguish between Iron Bug and humans because they have been isolated for so long...!
1000641417.korean: 오랫동안 고립되어 있어서 철충과 인간을 구분하지 못하는 것일수도...!

1000641418.english: There is some truth to what Azazel said.

1000641419.english: Then, it also explains why the Iron Bug were inside the branch's walls as if it were their own home.
1000641419.korean: 그렇다면 철충들이 마치 자기 집인것마냥 지부의 성벽 안에 있었던 것도 설명이 됩니다.

1000641420.english: Because of such circumstances, judgment must not be made according to the words of the scriptures?
1000641420.korean: 그런 사정이 있기 때문에, 경전의 말씀대로 심판해서는 안 된다?

1000641421.english: ...Ha. In that case, I will ask.

1000641422.english: If it is to be distorted in that way, what is the meaning of the scriptures' existence?
1000641422.korean: 그런 식으로 곡해할 것이라면, 경전의 존재 의미는 무엇인가?

1000641423.english: If you are going to pick and choose the words of light according to your own taste, what value is there in your faith...!
1000641423.korean: 빛의 말씀을 입맛대로 골라서 취할 것이라면, 네 믿음에 무슨 가치가 있는가...!

1000641425.english: Stop, Saraqael. Before we belong to the Order, we are members of the Orca Resistance.
1000641425.korean: 멈추십시오, 사라카엘 님. 지금의 저희는 교단 소속이기 이전에, 오르카 저항군의 일원입니다.

1000641426.english: The obligation to follow the rules established by the Savior, the leader-
1000641426.korean: 그 수장이신 구원자님이 만든 규칙에 따라야 할 의무가-

1000641427.english: Before that, it is also a creature of light!

1000641429.english: Damn it... A ban that forces the Judge's actions...

1000641430.english: Azazel, Veronica. I will not recognize you two as an angel and an inquisitor of the Order.
1000641430.korean: 아자젤, 베로니카. 나는 너희 둘을 교단의 천사와 이단심문관으로 인정하지 않겠다.

1000641431.english: Consider it fortunate that the savior you serve... cowardly placed a ban on me.
1000641431.korean: 너희가 모시는 구원자가... 비겁하게도 내게 금제를 걸어둔 것을 다행으로 알라.

1000641434.english: Yes. As expected, it seems they cannot use the Salsu spell against us.
1000641434.korean: 네. 역시 저희들에게 살수를 쓸 수는 없는 모양입니다.

1000641435.english: If Sarakael had really set her mind to it, neither Veronica nor I would have come out of it unscathed...
1000641435.korean: 사라카엘이 정말 마음을 먹었다면, 베로니카는 물론 저도 무사하진 못했겠죠...

1000641437.english: It is impossible for us to stop Saraqael among ourselves.

1000641438.english: Now that an unidentified Iron Bug has appeared on top of that, I suppose I should contact the Savior and ask for help.
1000641438.korean: 거기에 미확인 철충까지 나타난 이상, 구원자님에게 연락해서 도움을 요청해야겠죠.

1000641440.english: This is a problem for the denomination. This sanctuary, and Saraqael, too.
1000641440.korean: 이건 교단의 문제에요. 이 성역도, 사라카엘도.

1000641441.english: In the name of Azazel, the Archangel of the Order of the Second Coming of Kohei, I will resolve this matter myself.
1000641441.korean: 재림한 코헤이 교단을 이끄는 치품천사 아자젤의 이름으로, 이 건은 스스로 해결하겠어요.

1000641442.english: Then the situation might get even worse.

1000641447.english: Because I don't want to burden my partner anymore.
1000641447.korean: 반려에게... 더이상 부담을 주고 싶지 않으니까요.

1000641449.english: Let's go. We must hurry to catch up to Saraqael while unable to fly.
1000641449.korean: 가죠. 날지 못하는 상태로 사라카엘 님을 따라잡으려면 서둘러야 합니다.

1000641453.english: The center is... yeah, over there.

1000641457.english: This fog is confusing the senses.

1000641460.english: Hmm, not this time either. You're putting me to the test.
1000641460.korean: 흠, 이번에도 아닌가. 날 시험에 들게 하는군.

1000641463.english: Still, it is closer than before.

1000641464.english: However, I feel like I keep going in circles...
1000641464.korean: 그런데, 계속 같은 곳을 돌고 있는 기분이...

1000641467.english: ..."The light says, 'Do not be deceived by what is before your eyes,' and says, 'Be simple so that you may distinguish between what is mine and what is your neighbor's.'"
1000641467.korean: ..."빛이 눈앞의 것에 현혹되지 말라 이르시되, 나의 것과 이웃의 것을 분별할 수 있도록 간결히 하라"

1000641468.english: Have these apostates... truly forgotten the teachings of the Light...!
1000641468.korean: 이 배교자들은... 정녕 빛의 가르침을 잊은 것인가...!

1000641469.english: How dare you deceive the Judge's eyes with fog!

1000641471.english: I told you I wouldn't deal with you anymore.

1000641474.english: We are just following you. It's okay if you don't worry.
1000641474.korean: 저희는 그냥 당신을 따라갈 뿐이에요. 신경쓰지 않아도 괜찮아요.

1000641475.english: If you are really worried... you can even use force to prevent them from following you.
1000641475.korean: 정 신경쓰이면... 무력으로라도 못 따라오게 하셔도 좋아요.

1000641476.english: Because it is simple to stop you when you are not giving your all.
1000641476.korean: 전력을 다하지 못하는 당신을 막아내는 건 간단하니까요.

1000641477.english: Your sophistry has increased. Did the Savior deceive you?

1000641478.english: I just made up my mind to take it seriously.

1000641481.english: Hey, you told me to do as I pleased, and then immediately attacked...?
1000641481.korean: 마, 마음대로 하라면서 바로 공격... 을...?

1000641482.english: Unable to find my way amidst the delusion of the fog, I will proceed straight toward that tower.
1000641482.korean: 안개의 미혹에 길을 찾을 수 없으니, 저 탑을 향해 정면으로 나아가겠다.

1000641483.english: But, even so, how can you destroy the house!
1000641483.korean: 그, 그렇다고 집을 부수면 어떻게 해요!

1000641484.english: Ha. Do you think the judge will spare any effort in the execution?
1000641484.korean: 하. 심판관이 집행에 손속을 둘 것 같은가.

1000641485.english: Follow me or do as you please.

1000641486.english: Fortunately, it is an empty house.

1000641487.english: It looks like all the residents have gone somewhere.
1000641487.korean: 아무래도 주민들 모두 어딘가로 간 것 같군요.

1000641489.english: Let's hurry and chase after them.

1000641491.english: Is this the square? The apostates were holding a rally.

1000641492.english: I'll... wipe you out in one fell swoop...!

1000641495.english: The human heart is fragile and easily stained by darkness, so I shall grant it the opportunity to regain the radiance of light.
1000641495.korean: "인간의 마음은 연약해 쉬이 어둠에 물드니, 빛의 광명을 되찾을 기회를 주리라."...

1000641496.english: It's tiring to respond to every single one.

1000641497.english: Fine, Azazel. Go ahead and do as you please. However...
1000641497.korean: 좋다, 아자젤. 어디 네가 원하는대로 해보아라. 다만...

1000641498.english: If they do not ultimately return to the embrace of the light, they will not be able to prevent the wrath of the Judge.
1000641498.korean: 그들이 끝내 빛의 품으로 돌아오지 않는다면, 심판관의 분노를 막지 못할 것이다.

1000641500.english: Ahem. Glory to the light. The Archangel Azazel has come down in response to your faith.
1000641500.korean: 흠흠. 빛에 영광을. 치품천사 아자젤이 여러분의 믿음에 응답하여 내려왔어요.

1000641501.english: God nurtures us through trials and desires for us to return to Her...
1000641501.korean: 빛은 시련을 통해 우리를 양육하시며 자신에게로 돌아오기를 원하시니...

1000641502.english: Please grant us, who wander without a set time or season, unblemished faith and assist us in reaching the truth.
1000641502.korean: 정해진 시기와 때가 없어 방황하는 저희에게 부족함 없는 믿음을 내리시어 진리에 도달하게 보조해 주시옵소서.

1000641503.english: They are also in a similar state to earlier.

1000641504.english: Look... a believer who appears to be a high priest is coming.
1000641504.korean: 저기... 고위 사제로 보이는 신도가 오고 있군요.

1000641506.english: The Light took pity on us and caused the Seraphim Azazel to descend to this place...!
1000641506.korean: 빛께서 저희를 어여삐 여기셔 이곳에 치품천사 아자젤님을 강림케 하시니...!

1000641507.english: As a servant of light, I will gladly accept any judgment.
1000641507.korean: 빛의 종으로써, 어떤 심판이라도 달게 받겠습니다.

1000641508.english: Glory to the light. I am deeply impressed by your profound faith.
1000641508.korean: 빛에 영광을. 당신의 깊은 신앙에 감복했어요.

1000641509.english: I have a few things I'd like to ask. Would you mind listening?
1000641509.korean: 묻고 싶은 것이 몇 가지 있어요. 들어주시겠어요?

1000641511.english: What is that tower over there? This place... is it a branch of the Kohei Cult?
1000641511.korean: 저기 저 탑은 무엇인가요? 여기는... 코헤이 교단의 지부가 맞는거죠?

1000641513.english: ...Excuse me, Azazel. I see you weren't from the Kagoshima branch.

1000641514.english: In that case, do you intend to exclude us?

1000641515.english: That is not the case. The fact that a messenger of light visited from the outside during the blessing-filled 'Descent of Light' is also the grace of light.
1000641515.korean: 그렇지 않습니다. 축복이 가득한 '빛내림' 기간에 외부에서 빛의 사자가 찾아오신 것 또한 빛의 은혜.

1000641516.english: We will help with anything we can.
1000641516.korean: 저희가 도울 수 있는 일이라면 무엇이든 돕겠습니다.

1000641517.english: Hehe, the Light will be pleased, too.

1000641518.english: But everyone... since when have you been keeping your faith here?
1000641518.korean: 그런데 여러분은... 언제부터 이곳에서 믿음을 지키고 계셨나요?

1000641519.english: It goes back to the 'Iron Punishment', Lord Azazel.

1000641520.english: Are you saying that it has maintained its influence for nearly a hundred years?
1000641520.korean: 백 년 가까이 교세를 유지했단 말입니까?

1000641521.english: It is all thanks to the grace of light.

1000641522.english: By any chance... are there any living humans from the Order?
1000641522.korean: 혹시... 살아있는 교단의 인간님도 있는 건가요?

1000641523.english: That is not the case. They all... fell asleep in an eternal dream following the 'Iron Punishment'.
1000641523.korean: 그렇지는 않습니다. 전부... '철의 징벌'에 뒤이은 영원한 꿈 속에 잠드셨죠.

1000641525.english: The name of that tower supporting the light is 'Babel'. It is a sacred artifact prepared for the temple by the Children of Light who survived the 'Iron Punishment'.
1000641525.korean: 빛을 떠받드는 저 탑의 이름은 '바벨'. '철의 징벌'에서 살아남은 빛의 아이들이 성전을 위해 준비한 신물입니다.

1000641526.english: Through that boundless grace, we were able to cultivate fields in dry land and quench our thirst in the storm.
1000641526.korean: 그 끝을 알 수 없는 은혜를 통해, 저희는 마른 땅에서 밭을 일구고 폭풍 속에서 목을 축일 수 있었습니다.

1000641527.english: It looks like some kind of control device.

1000641528.english: Priest, who are you following now?
1000641528.korean: 사제여, 지금 너희가 따르는 것은 누구냐.

1000641529.english: We follow only the word of light.

1000641530.english: Do not tell a lie to the judge!

1000641531.english: Then what on earth is the symbol of the order that was irreverently desecrated?
1000641531.korean: 그렇다면 불경하게도 훼손된 교단의 상징은 대체 뭐지?

1000641533.english: Stand back, Azazel. I have no intention of disobeying the scriptures.
1000641533.korean: 물러서 있어라, 아자젤. 경전의 말씀을 어길 생각은 없다.

1000641534.english: However, in order to repent, one must first recognize one's own sins. Here and now, I will expose their sins in detail.
1000641534.korean: 하지만 죄를 뉘우치기 위해선 먼저 스스로의 죄를 알아야 하는 법. 이 자리에서 이들의 죄를 낱낱히 밝혀내겠다.

1000641535.english: Ah, glory to the light. How could I tell a lie to the fair and just Judge?
1000641535.korean: 아아, 빛에 영광을. 공명정대하고 정의로운 심판관님께 어찌 거짓을 고하겠습니까.

1000641536.english: Long ago, the 'prophet' who safeguards our faith heard the voice of light.
1000641536.korean: 옛날, 저희들의 믿음을 수호하는 '예언자'께서 빛의 목소리를 들으셨습니다.

1000641537.english: The Light rewarded our faith by sending down an apostle and promised to bring us back to the embrace of the Light soon.
1000641537.korean: 빛께선 저희들의 신앙에 보답하여 사도를 내려주시었고, 곧 빛의 품으로 돌아오게 해주겠다고 약속하셨습니다.

1000641538.english: To uphold that word, the Prophet revised the scriptures and created new symbols following the appearance of the light witnessed in the prophecy.
1000641538.korean: 그 말씀을 받들기 위해, 예언자께선 경전을 개찬하시고 예언에서 목도한 빛의 모습을 따라 상징또한 새로이 만드셨습니다.

1000641539.english: Are you declaring that you have damaged the scriptures before the judge?
1000641539.korean: 심판관의 앞에서... 경전을 훼손했다고 고하는 것인가?

1000641540.english: …”The Light said mercifully, ‘Even though darkness has settled and blinded your eyes…’”
1000641540.korean: ..."빛께서 자애로이 가로되, 어둠이 내려앉아 네 눈을 가리어도..."

1000641541.english: If you do not lose faith, a new path will open.

1000641543.english: That is correct. We followed the new path given by the Light, and...
1000641543.korean: 그렇습니다. 저희는 빛께서 내려주신 새로운 길을 따랐고...

1000641546.english: It was the Savior, the agent of light, who sent us.
1000641546.korean: 저희를 보낸 건 바로, 빛의 대리인인 구원자님이에요.

1000641548.english: Is it, is it really true? Did the Savior really descend to the present world...?!
1000641548.korean: 정말, 정말입니까? 정말로 구원자께서 현세에 강림하셨단 말입니까...?!

1000641549.english: Yes. There is no doubt about it.

1000641551.english: Glory to the light! Glory to the light...!

1000641552.english: Heh heh, and as the last human remaining in this world, he will defeat the "Iron Punishment"... no, the Iron Beasts and other threats, and bring blessings back to this land—
1000641552.korean: 후후, 그리고 그분은 이 세상에 남은 유일한 인간님으로서, '철의 징벌'... 아니, 철충과 다른 위협을 물리치고 이 땅에 다시 축복을-

1000641554.english: Are you saying that the Savior... descended by borrowing a human body?
1000641554.korean: 구원자께서... 인간의 몸을 빌려 강림하셨단 말씀이십니까?

1000641555.english: That's right. The Savior is really cool...

1000641556.english: Because he is truly a kind and strong person, you too—
1000641556.korean: 정말 자애로우시고 강인한 분이니까, 여러분 또한-

1000641557.english: O Light, look upon your little lamb who was seduced by the sweet whispers of darkness.
1000641557.korean: 빛이시여. 어둠의 달콤한 속삭임에 현혹되었던 당신의 어린 양을 굽어 살펴 주십시오.

1000641560.english: The deepest darkness falls just before dawn; do not lose faith until the moment of salvation.
1000641560.korean: "동이 트기 직전에 가장 짙은 어둠이 드리우니, 구원의 순간까지 믿음을 잃지 말라."

1000641561.english: Unholy creatures. How dare you point a weapon at the Order's angel.
1000641561.korean: 불경한 것들. 감히 교단의 천사에게 무기를 들이대다니.

1000641562.english: Everyone, wait a moment! Please listen to me!

1000641563.english: Don't you understand yet? Their hearts are already filled with darkness.
1000641563.korean: 아직도 모르겠나? 이들의 마음 속엔 이미 어둠이 들어차있다.

1000641564.english: Bow your heads, apostates. The lightning of judgment will wash away your sins.
1000641564.korean: 머리를 조아리거라, 배교자들이여. 심판의 번개가 너희의 죄를 씻어내리니.

1000641565.english: It seems they are not immune to the effects of this fog either.
1000641565.korean: 저들도 이 안개의 영향에서 자유롭지는 못한 모양입니다.

1000641567.english: Yes, no problem. More than that...

1000641568.english: Thank you for following my instructions, Saraqael.

1000641569.english: I just made a strategic decision. There were too many of them to atone for them all on the spot.
1000641569.korean: 전략적인 판단을 내렸을 뿐이다. 그자리에서 모두 속죄시키기엔 수가 너무 많더군.

1000641570.english: Even an AGS from the denomination is showing up. And it wasn't even an old antique.
1000641570.korean: 교단 소속의 AGS까지 튀어나오다니. 그것도 오래된 골동품이 아니었다.

1000641571.english: It seems to have been produced in the industrial complex over there.
1000641571.korean: 저 쪽에 있는 공장 단지에서 생산된 것 같습니다.

1000641572.english: As that priest said earlier, you've achieved a certain degree of independence.
1000641572.korean: 아까 그 사제의 말대로, 어느정도 자립을 이루었군요.

1000641574.english: Please don't worry too much. There must be some reason.
1000641574.korean: 너무 심려치 마십시오. 분명 무슨 사정이 있을겁니다.

1000641578.english: That was a hasty judgment. They are free from the influence of the fog.
1000641578.korean: 섣부른 판단이었군. 저들은 안개의 영향에서 자유롭다.

1000641579.english: It's my fault. It was a trap.

1000641588.english: No matter how much corruption has taken root, flying in the sanctuary is the ultimate taboo!
1000641588.korean: 아무리 타락이 둥지를 틀었다 한들, 성역에서 비행하는 것은 금기중의 금기!

1000641589.english: You deserve to die a hundred times just for saying that!
1000641589.korean: 입에 담은 것 만으로 백 번 죽어 마땅하다!

1000641595.english: It's a secret passage. It's cleverly hidden.

1000641596.english: There's no way. Let's follow them for now.

1000641599.english: I will definitely return and punish those apostates...!

1000641601.english: It seems like there's nothing dangerous for now.
1000641601.korean: 일단 위험한 건 없는 것 같아요.

1000641602.english: When looking at the direction, it's heading toward the outer edge of the branch.
1000641602.korean: 방향을 볼 때 지부 외곽으로 향하고 있습니다.

1000641603.english: I don't know how long it will last, but it seems like I'll be able to get out of it soon.
1000641603.korean: 얼마나 이어져 있는지는 모르겠지만, 곧 벗어날 수 있을 것 같습니다.

1000641604.english: The author in the lead isn't saying a word.
1000641604.korean: 앞서가는 저자는 한 마디도 하지 않는군.

1000641605.english: Apostate, where are you leading us?

1000641609.english: There are blasphemous things scattered everyplace.

1000641616.english: It seems I haven't been able to leave the branch boundaries yet.
1000641616.korean: 아직 지부의 경계를 벗어나지는 못 한 것 같습니다.

1000641617.english: Excuse me, I can still see the city walls.

1000641620.english: There's no sign of apostates around.

1000641623.english: Let's follow them for now. It would be good to have a conversation.
1000641623.korean: 일단 따라가봐요. 이야기를 나누어 보는게 좋겠어요.

1000641625.english: Isn't it the denomination's sanctuary? It's completely in ruins.

1000641626.english: Um... Thank you for your help.

1000641630.english: Please wait in the next room for a moment. It's time to pray.
1000641630.korean: 잠깐 옆 방에서 기다려주세요. 기도를 드릴 시간입니다.

1000641637.english: Do you not hold anyone accountable for the crime of rudeness?

1000641639.english: From the author... one can feel a deep and transparent faith.

1000641640.english: Considering that they helped us, they surely haven't fallen into darkness.
1000641640.korean: 우리를 도와준 것도 그렇고, 분명 어둠에 빠지지 않은 거겠지.

1000641641.english: Yes. Not as much as Saraqael, but I also vaguely sensed it.
1000641641.korean: 네. 사라카엘 만큼은 아니지만, 저도 어렴풋이 느꼈어요.

1000641642.english: She is a faithful soul found with great difficulty in a den of corruption. As an angel of the church, I simply cannot take away her time for prayer.
1000641642.korean: 타락의 온상에서 어렵게 찾은 신실한 자다. 교단의 천사로서, 기도 시간을 빼앗을 수는 없지.

1000641643.english: Yes. Then, we should also offer a prayer of thanks to the Savior who helped us escape safely, and take a breather.
1000641643.korean: 네. 그럼 저희도 무사히 빠져나올 수 있게 도와주신 구원자님께 감사 기도를 올리고 한숨 돌리는 게 좋겠습니다.

1000641650.english: It is because it is the "Sunlight" period. It is perfectly understandable.

1000641651.english: I didn't sense any signs of it escaping.

1000641657.english: As expected, you were an angel.

1000641658.english: ...I can feel it exactly as it is. How can faith be so devout and transparent...
1000641658.korean: ...그대로 느껴져요. 어찌 이렇게 독실하고 투명한 믿음인지...

1000641660.english: That believer's faith is genuine. No matter what trial comes, it won't be able to break that faith.
1000641660.korean: 저 신도의 신앙은 진짜다. 그 어떤 시련이라도, 그 믿음을 꺾지 못하겠지.

1000641662.english: It is Angel. I am certain.

1000641663.english: Although her rank is lower than ours, isn’t she the first angel?
1000641663.korean: 우리보다 품계는 낮으나, 최초의 천사가 아닌가.

1000641664.english: So there was a reason you were able to preserve your faith in this hotbed of corruption.
1000641664.korean: 이 타락의 온상에서 신앙을 지킬 수 있었던 이유가 있었군.

1000641665.english: Ah, it looks like the prayer is over.

1000641668.english: Angel, a servant of light, greets Azazel, the Archangel of the Order of the Serpent, and Saraqael, the Judge.
1000641668.korean: 빛의 종인 엔젤이 치품천사 아자젤님과 심판관 사라카엘님을 뵙습니다.

1000641670.english: Yes. I see you have a lot you'd like to hear.
1000641670.korean: 네. 듣고 싶은 것이 많으신 거군요.

1000641671.english: I sense curiosity, anger, and a bit of confusion in Saraqael.
1000641671.korean: 사라카엘님께서 궁금증과 진노, 그리고 약간의 혼란이 느껴져요.

1000641678.english: Compassion and acceptance of all things...

1000641680.english: Ugh... really... for such a long time...

1000641683.english: The light did not abandon you.

1000641685.english: Have you calmed down a bit?

1000641688.english: As you said, I guess I was briefly overcome with emotion by the fact that the Light did not abandon us.
1000641688.korean: 말씀대로, 빛께서 저희를 버리지 않았다는 사실에... 잠깐 감정이 북받쳤나봐요.

1000641689.english: I’d like to introduce myself once again. I am Jipumcheonsa Angel.
1000641689.korean: 다시 한 번 인사드릴게요. 저는 지품천사 엔젤.

1000641690.english: I belong to the Kagoshima branch of the Kohei Order.

1000641691.english: Angel, there is something I want to ask you.

1000641692.english: So you are curious about the sanctuary and the believers.

1000641693.english: I can't tell you everything, but I'll let you know as much as I can.
1000641693.korean: 다는 말씀드릴 수 없지만, 가능한 만큼은 알려드릴게요.

1000641694.english: Are you trying to conceal the truth from the judge?

1000641695.english: It is because I shouldn't get you... deeply involved.
1000641695.korean: 여러분을... 깊게 관여하게 해서는 안되기 때문이에요.

1000641696.english: Because this is a mission we must bear without fail.
1000641696.korean: 이건, 반드시 저희가 짊어져야 할 사명이니까.

1000641698.english: I understand. I will respect your beliefs.

1000641703.english: The light is always by your side.

1000641704.english: This, too, is merely a trial. The light always permits only as many trials as we can overcome.
1000641704.korean: 이 또한 시련일뿐. 빛은 언제나 우리가 이겨낼 수 있을 만큼의 시련만 허락하십니다.

1000641705.english: The agents of light spoke! If we become one!
1000641705.korean: 빛의 대리인들이 말씀하셨다! 우리가 하나 된다면!

1000641706.english: You can overcome even the toughest trials!

1000641708.english: Fellow believers, we will conclude today's service here.
1000641708.korean: 신도님들, 금일 예배는 이쯤에서 마치도록 하겠습니다.

1000641709.english: There will likely be a donation box set up on the way back to your assigned accommodation, so please do not make an effort to donate.
1000641709.korean: 배정된 숙소로 돌아가는 길에 헌금함이 설치 되어있을텐데, 무리는 하지 말아주세요.

1000641710.english: To understand the will of light, only a little sincerity is needed.
1000641710.korean: 빛의 의지를 이해하기 위해선 약간의, 진심이 필요할 뿐입니다.

1000641712.english: Thank you for your hard work, angels.

1000641713.english: Today's extracurricular activity is over. Now...

1000641716.english: Can't I take a break for just one day, exactly one day?
1000641716.korean: 하루만, 딱 하루만 쉬면 안 될까요?

1000641719.english: For the sake of the believers, and to realize the will of the light... I am fully willing to dedicate myself.
1000641719.korean: 신도들을 위해서라면, 빛의 의지를 실현하기 위해서라면... 이 한몸 정도는 얼마든지 헌신할 수 있습니다.

1000641721.english: So then. As you know, this training is designed for two people with telepathic abilities to handle the barbell with ease.
1000641721.korean: 자, 그럼. 아시겠지만 이 훈련은 정신감응 능력을 가진 두 분께서 바벨을 자유자재로 다루기 위한 훈련입니다.

1000641722.english: After most of the angels returned to the embrace of the light, only three angels remained on Earth.
1000641722.korean: 천사분들 대다수가 빛의 품으로 돌아가신 후, 지상에 남은 천사님들은 셋 뿐.

1000641723.english: In order to spread the will of the light to the world and stabilize the chaotic times, the two of you must be able to handle Babel as soon as possible.
1000641723.korean: 빛의 뜻을 세상에 전파하고, 혼란스러운 세태를 안정시키기 위해선 두 분께서 하루라도 빨리 바벨을 다룰 수 있어야 합니다.

1000641724.english: If that happens... we will be able to unite everyone's thoughts and move forward truthfully with the will of light.
1000641724.korean: 그렇게 된다면... 모두의 생각을 하나로 모아 빛의 의지로 진실히 나아갈 수 있을 테니까요.

1000641725.english: I beg of you. Please save us.

1000641726.english: Please lift your head, Branch Manager. I am ready.

1000641730.english: Thank you for your hard work, angels. That is all for today's training.
1000641730.korean: 수고 많으셨습니다, 천사님들. 오늘 훈련은 여기까지입니다.

1000641731.english: But... that's a shame. To think you still can't fully handle the barbell...
1000641731.korean: 하지만... 아쉽군요. 아직도 바벨을 완전히 다룰 수 없다니...

1000641732.english: I was thinking of increasing the dosage slightly. What do you think?

1000641734.english: If it is for the sake of the believers...

1000641738.english: No, that is not possible. Since you are in charge of fine-tuning the barbell, excessive effort would actually be detrimental. It is sufficient to focus only on other training.
1000641738.korean: 안 됩니다. 엔젤님께서는 바벨의 미세조정을 맡아주셔야 하기 때문에 과한 능력은 오히려 독이 됩니다. 다른 훈련에만 집중하셔도 충분하지요.

1000641739.english: Haven't you already become able to empathize with others' emotions as if they were your own? That is enough.
1000641739.korean: 이미 다른 사람의 감정도 자기 것처럼 공감할 수 있게 됐지 않았습니까? 그정도면 문제 없습니다.

1000641740.english: Then, I will administer the medication to your right arm this time. As for your left arm... you will need time to recover.
1000641740.korean: 그럼 이번엔 오른팔에 투약하겠습니다. 왼팔은... 회복할 시간이 필요하실 테니까요.

1000641745.english: It's okay. You just need to hang in there a little longer.

1000641746.english: I can already wield the grace of light. With just a little more effort... I will be able to unite everyone's hearts.
1000641746.korean: 벌써 빛의 은총을 다룰 수 있게 됐어요. 조금만 더 노력하면... 모두의 마음을 하나로 모을 수 있을 거예요.

1000641747.english: Now, will you hold my hand again today?

1000641748.english: ...You're trying to tell yourself in your heart that it's okay again, aren't you?

1000641749.english: Otherwise, Angel will be all day long again— *cough*...!
1000641749.korean: 그러지 않으면 엔젤은 또 하루종일- 콜록...!

1000641751.english: I'll go get the medicine from the priests...!

1000641753.english: Just... holding my hand is enough.

1000641755.english: Hehe... If it really, really gets too hard, I'll definitely tell Angel.
1000641755.korean: 후후... 정말로, 정말로 힘들면 엔젤에게 꼭 이야기 할게요.

1000641758.english: Angel, could you check outside the door for a moment?

1000641759.english: Yes... Huh? What's with the envelope...

1000641761.english: Hehe, I wonder if the priests stopped by?

1000641765.english: The light told me in secret.

1000641767.english: Heh heh, are you having that much fun?

1000641768.english: Yes! It's usually time for training, but you're out playing with your sister.
1000641768.korean: 네! 원래 훈련 받아야 할 시간인데, 언니랑 놀러 나왔잖아요.

1000641769.english: But I suppose the priests are also having a hard time, just like us, right? You've been sleeping a lot more lately.
1000641769.korean: 그런데 역시 저희만큼 사제님들도 고생하시는 거겠죠? 요즘 부쩍 잠이 늘어나셨어요.

1000641771.english: Training is going smoothly... I was surprised to see pillars of light erupt from the barbell and the entire base when my sister infused it with power.
1000641771.korean: 훈련도 순조롭고... 언니가 힘을 불어넣으니까, 바벨하고 지부 전체에서 빛기둥이 솟구치는 걸 보고 깜짝 놀랐어요.

1000641772.english: No matter how hard I try, I just can't seem to be of much help to my older sister... I guess I just can't keep up with my sister's belief in the light...
1000641772.korean: 저는 아무리 해도 언니를 보조하는 게 한계던데... 역시 저는 언니의 빛에 대한 믿음을 따라가지 못하나봐요...

1000641773.english: No, it's not. It's been a huge help.
1000641773.korean: 아니에요. 정말 큰 도움이 되고 있어요.

1000641774.english: Really? Hehe, I'll work harder too!
1000641774.korean: 정말요? 에헤헷, 저도 더 열심히 할게요!

1000641776.english: Oh, there comes the little angel.
1000641776.korean: 아, 저기 꼬마 천사님이 오고 있네요.

1000641778.english: It's dangerous to run around like that.

1000641779.english: Little angel, what's going on today?

1000641780.english: Hehe, I have a question! Oh, I have something to give you too.
1000641780.korean: 헤헤, 물어볼 게 있어서! 아, 줄 것도 있어.

1000641781.english: Ta-da! Cookies that look just like the angel sisters!
1000641781.korean: 짠! 천사 언니들이랑 똑같이 생긴 쿠키!

1000641783.english: This, the short cookie on the right is me, right?
1000641783.korean: 이거, 오른쪽에 키가 작은 쿠키가 저인거죠?

1000641784.english: That, that's Sister Azazel... Because my hair is longer now...
1000641784.korean: 그, 그건 아자젤 언니인데... 머리카락이 더 기니까...

1000641785.english: Um... Huh? Oh, please don't cry, little angel.
1000641785.korean: 어... 어? 우, 울지 마세요, 꼬마 천사님.

1000641786.english: Then... It made me sad too... Hmph...

1000641787.english: Angel means the side of the little angel's hand opposite the one holding the spoon.
1000641787.korean: 엔젤은 꼬마 천사님이 수저를 잡는 손의 반대쪽을 뜻한 거예요.

1000641788.english: So, you got it exactly right, right?

1000641790.english: Th-of course! Here, this cookie is me. Right?
1000641790.korean: 그, 그럼요! 여기, 이 쿠키가 저. 맞죠?

1000641791.english: Yeah! I'll give them to the older sisters.

1000641792.english: Thank you. I will cherish it.

1000641793.english: Huh? You can't keep it. You have to eat it!

1000641795.english: Little Angel, didn't you say you had something to ask?
1000641795.korean: 꼬마 천사님, 물어볼 것도 있다고 하지 않으셨나요?

1000641798.english: You can even take down Iron Bugs with a barbell. So, it's safe now, right?
1000641798.korean: 바벨로 철충도 잡을 수 있잖아. 그럼 이제 안전한거지?

1000641799.english: Can I go to school and play with my friends now?
1000641799.korean: 이제 학교가서 친구들이랑 놀 수 있는 거야?

1000641800.english: Of course, Little Angel. Angel and I are working hard to make that happen.
1000641800.korean: 물론이죠, 꼬마 천사님. 그렇게 되도록 저와 엔젤이 노력하는 중이에요.

1000641801.english: If you listen to your parents like you do now, don't be picky eaters, and pray to the light, everything will return to normal.
1000641801.korean: 지금처럼 부모님 말씀 잘 듣고, 편식하지 않고, 빛께 기도하면 모든 게 원래대로 돌아갈 거예요.

1000641804.english: Now, shall we make a pinky promise?

1000641806.english: Hehe, I'll come again next time!

1000641807.english: She is truly an angelic child.

1000641808.english: Yes. Even for the sake of people like that, we need to... Ah.
1000641808.korean: 네. 바로 저런 분들을 위해서라도 저희가 힘을... 아.

1000641810.english: No, that's not it. I can feel Ramiel fighting the Iron Bug outside the branch.
1000641810.korean: 아니에요. 지부 밖에서 라미엘이 철충과 싸우는게 느껴져서요.

1000641811.english: It's been a while. There haven't been many lately...

1000641812.english: Huh? But unnie, are you able to do it even without a barbell?
1000641812.korean: 어? 그런데 언니, 바벨이 없어도 할 수 있게 된 거예요?

1000641813.english: Oh my. I tried to keep it a secret, but I got caught.

1000641815.english: For the Light does not abandon those who strive. Thank you for the grace of the Light.
1000641815.korean: 빛께선 노력하는 자를 내버리지 않으시니까요. 빛의 은혜에 감사를.

1000641816.english: Thank you for the grace of the light. I will try harder as well.
1000641816.korean: 빛의 은혜에 감사를. 저도 더 노력할게요.

1000641817.english: Yes. For Lord Ramiel, who is fighting outside, and for the believers as well.
1000641817.korean: 네. 밖에서 싸우고 계시는 라미엘님을 위해서도, 신도분들을 위해서도.

1000641818.english: For our sake as well... because it is our mission to realize the will of light through Babel.
1000641818.korean: 저희들을 위해서도... 바벨을 통해 빛의 의지를 실현하는 것이, 저희의 사명이니까요.

1000641821.english: However, the important thing is that nothing was said.
1000641821.korean: 하지만, 중요한 건 아무것도 말하지 않았다.

1000641823.english: So the branch remained intact for some time even after the arrival of the Iron Bug.
1000641823.korean: 철충의 도래 이후에도 지부는 얼마간 건재했던 거군요.

1000641824.english: Then what about Babel? Did you build that tower as well?
1000641824.korean: 그렇다면 바벨은요? 저 탑도 여러분이 건설하신 건가요?

1000641826.english: The human who was the branch manager gathered the survivors of the cult right here at the Kagoshima branch.
1000641826.korean: 지부장이었던 인간님은 바로 이곳, 가고시마 지부로 교단의 생존자들을 결집시키셨어요.

1000641827.english: There was a fierce battle, but humans and angels alike fought as one under the will of the light and were barely able to defend the base.
1000641827.korean: 치열한 전투가 있었지만, 인간님들도 천사들도 빛의 뜻 아래 하나되어 싸우며 간신히 거점을 지켜낼 수 있었죠.

1000641828.english: Then, the branch manager declared this place a saint of the Kohei Order and built Babel.
1000641828.korean: 그리고나서 지부장은 이곳을 코헤이 교단의 성도로 선포하곤, 바벨을 건설했어요.

1000641829.english: Just then, the Iron Bug's attacks subsided, so we were able to complete it safely.
1000641829.korean: 마침 철충의 공격도 한풀 꺾여서 무사히 완공될 수 있었죠.

1000641830.english: I was thinking about this earlier, but you and the old Azazel could sense other people's feelings. Is that right?
1000641830.korean: 아까도 생각했지만, 너와 예전의 아자젤은 타인의 마음을 느낄 수 있더군. 맞나?

1000641831.english: Yes. My sister and I... were born solely to control the Babel.
1000641831.korean: 네. 저와 언니는... 오직 바벨을 제어하기 위해 태어났어요.

1000641832.english: This telepathic ability was essential for that.

1000641833.english: I have seen it in the records left by the denomination.
1000641833.korean: 교단의 남겨진 기록에서 본 적이 있습니다.

1000641834.english: The first angel ever created—to be precise, the predecessor of the current angels and the archetype of all angels—was said to be able to read the emotions and thoughts of others.
1000641834.korean: 최초로 탄생한 엔젤, 정확히는 지금의 엔젤의 전신이자 모든 천사의 원형이 된 천사는 타인의 감정과 생각을 읽을 수 있었다고.

1000641835.english: My sister and I aren't as powerful as the first angels, though.
1000641835.korean: 저와 언니의 능력은 최초의 천사만큼 강력하지는 않지만요.

1000641838.english: This is ominous. The fog is getting thicker and spreading all the way here.
1000641838.korean: 심상치 않군요. 안개가 더 짙어지고, 이곳까지 뻗어오고 있습니다.

1000641840.english: I thought I would have more time...!

1000641842.english: The light has started descending! Everyone, you must get out of the branch immediately...
1000641842.korean: 빛내림이 시작됐어요! 여러분, 어서 지부 밖으로 나가셔야...

1000641843.english: Ah, the curtain of light is already...!

1000641845.english: Was this the prophecy the apostates were speaking of?

1000641846.english: To be precise... I am trying to fulfill that prophecy.
1000641846.korean: 정확히는... 그 예언을 실현시키려고 하는 거예요.

1000641847.english: What is the content of that prophecy?

1000641848.english: I'm sorry, I can't tell you.

1000641849.english: Please leave the branch as is, escort the Savior, and get as far away as possible.
1000641849.korean: 여러분은 이대로 지부를 나가셔서, 구원자님을 모시고 최대한 멀리 벗어나 주세요.

1000641850.english: As an angel of the Order, I also ask for forgiveness for the sacrilege of not being able to see the Savior— Ah...!
1000641850.korean: 교단의 천사로서, 구원자님을 뵙지 못하는 불경을 용서해달라고도- 아...!

1000641851.english: To think the Curtain of Light is already complete... this is unbelievable...
1000641851.korean: 벌써 빛의 장막이 완성되다니, 이건 말도 안 돼...

1000641852.english: Photons that condense and exert physical force.

1000641854.english: Yes. It is very similar to the power of light that I handle.
1000641854.korean: 네. 제가 다루는 빛의 힘과 굉장히 유사해요.

1000641859.english: If things go wrong, the Savior and the others will be in danger as well.

1000641862.english: This barrier also blocks indirect interference, such as radio waves.
1000641862.korean: 이 장벽은 전파와 같은 간접적인 간섭도 차단하고 있다.

1000641863.english: This place is completely alien now.

1000641864.english: As expected, I had to contact the savior first.
1000641864.korean: 역시 먼저 구원자에게 연락을 해야 했어요.

1000641865.english: This happened because of my stubbornness...

1000641866.english: Given the scale of this, even outsiders must have noticed the anomaly.
1000641866.korean: 이정도 규모라면 외부에서도 이변을 눈치챘을 겁니다.

1000641867.english: The Savior will surely find a way, too.

1000641868.english: Yes, this is a good opportunity to verify the true nature of that savior.
1000641868.korean: 그래, 그 구원자의 실체를 확인할 좋은 기회다.

1000641869.english: This isn't the time for that!

1000641870.english: Calm down, Azazel. Nothing has changed.
1000641870.korean: 냉정해져라, 아자젤. 상황은 아무것도 변하지 않았다.

1000641871.english: Didn't you decide from the beginning to solve it yourself without telling the Savior?
1000641871.korean: 처음부터 구원자에게 알리지 않고 스스로 해결하겠다고 마음먹지 않았나?

1000641873.english: I'm sorry, Azazel. Saraqael kept prying into my questions...
1000641873.korean: 죄송합니다, 아자젤님. 사라카엘님이 계속 캐묻는 바람에...

1000641874.english: However, the savior could be in danger...

1000641875.english: Is the savior you believe in someone who cannot overcome even a crisis like this?
1000641875.korean: 네가 믿는 구원자는 이정도 위기 하나 극복하지 못하는 자인가?

1000641876.english: Is this all the faith you have in the Savior?
1000641876.korean: 구원자에 대한 네 믿음은 고작 이정도인가?

1000641878.english: Show me the power of the Savior whom you believe in so much. Show me your faith in the Savior.
1000641878.korean: 네가 그토록 믿는 구원자의 힘을 내게 보여라. 구원자에 대한 네 믿음을 내게 보여라.

1000641880.english: For a moment... darkness has invaded my heart.

1000641881.english: I believe in the Savior, Sarahael. The Savior will protect everyone else no matter what happens.
1000641881.korean: 저는 구원자를 믿습니다, 사라카엘. 구원자는 무슨 일이 있어도 다른 분들을 전부 지켜낼 거예요.

1000641882.english: And when we are in danger... they will definitely save us.
1000641882.korean: 그리고 저희가 위험에 처했을 때... 반드시 구해줄거예요.

1000641883.english: Hmph. Let's see how things go.

1000641885.english: I apologize for interrupting you, but...

1000641888.english: It's towards Babel. Since that's the direction we have to go anyway, let's just follow it straight away.
1000641888.korean: 바벨 쪽이다. 어차피 우리가 가야하는 방향이니, 바로 쫓아가도록 하지.

1000641889.english: Has the guardian who turned their back on the light fallen so low? I cannot find any trace of the glory of the past, even if I rub my eyes high.
1000641889.korean: 빛을 등진 수호자는 이리도 영락하였는가. 과거의 영광은 눈을 씻고 봐도 찾을 수 없군.

1000641891.english: No. Ramiel is with the Will of Light.
1000641891.korean: 아뇨. 라미엘님께선 빛의 의지와 함께하고 계세요.

1000641892.english: She is undoubtedly trying to shoulder the sins of these apostates all by herself. Isn't that right?
1000641892.korean: 보나마나 이 배교자들의 죄를 혼자 짊어지려 하고 있겠지. 그렇지 않나?

1000641894.english: Still, if it is the Ramiel I know, she will definitely be of great help.
1000641894.korean: 그래도 제가 아는 라미엘이라면 분명 큰 도움이 될 거예요.

1000641895.english: Ramiel's traces are easy to follow.

1000641896.english: A huge dragging mark on the ground... there it is.
1000641896.korean: 땅에 끌리는 거대한 자국... 저기 있군요.

1000641903.english: I had almost given up on resurrecting her... Thankful for the grace of the light.
1000641903.korean: 부활 시키는 걸 거의 포기하고 있었는데... 빛의 은혜에 감사를.

1000641908.english: Angel, you said Ramiel was here.

1000641909.english: ...Yes. I sensed Ramiel fighting, so I rushed over here...
1000641909.korean: ...네. 라미엘님이 전투하시는 것이 느껴져서 급히 와봤는데...

1000641910.english: It seems they weren't taken advantage of. We'll probably meet soon.
1000641910.korean: 당하지는 않은 모양이다. 곧 만나게 되겠지.

1000641912.english: Why are there so many Iron Bug inside the branch...!
1000641912.korean: 어째서 지부 안에 철충이 이렇게나 많이...!

1000641913.english: They even broke through from outside the tent.

1000641914.english: A barrier that only Iron Bug can pass through? I’ve never heard of such a thing.
1000641914.korean: 철충만 통과할 수 있는 장막이라니, 그런 건 들어본 적도 없다.

1000641915.english: That curtain, or to be precise, all the light including the fog... is under my sister's control.
1000641915.korean: 저 장막, 정확히는 안개를 포함한 모든 빛은... 언니의 통제 하에 있어요.

1000641917.english: That's right. It's practically the same as having your eyes and ears wherever the fog is spread.
1000641917.korean: 맞아요. 안개가 퍼져 있는 모든 곳에 언니의 눈과 귀가 있는 거나 다름없죠.

1000641918.english: Barbell... what on earth is it?

1000641919.english: Babel is a kind of amplifier. It enhances my sister's abilities and spreads their influence over a wide area.
1000641919.korean: 바벨은 일종의 증폭기에요. 언니의 능력을 강화시키고, 넓은 범위에 그 영향을 퍼트리는.

1000641920.english: My sister is using that right now- Ah.

1000641921.english: Someone is approaching! I-I've never felt this before. It doesn't seem like a follower...
1000641921.korean: 누군가 접근하고 있어요! 처, 처음 느껴보는 감정이에요. 신도분은 아닌 것 같은데...

1000641923.english: Hello, Angel. It’s even better to see you outside.
1000641923.korean: 안녕하세요, 천사님. 밖에서 보니 더 반갑네요.

1000641924.english: Do you happen to know the way to that tower?
1000641924.korean: 혹시 저 탑으로 가는 길을 아시나요?

1000641925.english: Lord Azaz...? How did you get here?!

1000641926.english: It would take a while to explain, but I'll keep it short.

1000641927.english: Angel, could you please let us know the situation? The road is so complicated and confusing.
1000641927.korean: 천사님도 저희한테 상황을 좀 알려주시겠어요? 길이 너무 복잡해서 혼란스럽거든요.

1000641929.english: So... the Apostle of Light will descend soon and indiscriminately destroy the surroundings.
1000641929.korean: 그래서... 곧 빛의 사도가 강림하고, 주변을 무차별적으로 파괴할 거예요.

1000641930.english: We barely made it in just before the curtain rose.
1000641930.korean: 저희는 장막이 생기기 직전에 아슬아슬하게 들어왔어요.

1000641931.english: Anyway, you're saying the Commander is in danger?

1000641932.english: But we decided to believe in the Savior. There is no way to get out of here...
1000641932.korean: 그렇지만 저희는 구원자를 믿기로 했어요. 이곳에서 나갈 방법도 없고...

1000641934.english: I will be leaving now. I have to stay by my master's side.
1000641934.korean: 저는 이만 돌아가겠습니다. 주인님 곁을 지켜야 해요.

1000641935.english: I told you we had to go to that tower! You just told me earlier!

1000641936.english: I fully understand how you feel.

1000641938.english: I'm sorry, we won't be going out.

1000641939.english: Stop this situation, and the believers here and the crew of the Orca...
1000641939.korean: 이 사태를 멈추고, 이곳의 신도들과 오르카 호의 대원들...

1000641940.english: And I will protect the savior.

1000641941.english: So... I won't help you escape from here-
1000641941.korean: 그래서... 여러분이 이곳에서 탈출하는 걸 도와드리지는-

1000641942.english: Miss Draculina, what did you say just a moment ago?
1000641942.korean: 드라큐리나 양, 조금 전에 뭐라고 하셨죠?

1000641944.english: Ah, no. Not that, but before that...
1000641944.korean: 아, 아뇨. 그거 말고 그 전에...

1000641945.english: Then, shall we go? I don't know the way, so I'd like to ask you to guide me to the tower.
1000641945.korean: 그럼 갈까요? 저는 길을 모르니까 탑까지 안내를 부탁드릴게요.

1000641949.korean: 저는 그런 말은 한 적 없는데요?

1000641951.english: She's seriously invincible. I wonder if there's even anyone who can beat her with words?
1000641951.korean: 진짜 무적이네. 쟤를 말로 이길 수 있는 사람이 존재하기나 할까?

1000641952.english: I'll try my best to persuade Eternity. We can just negotiate using the password.
1000641952.korean: 이터니티씨는 제가 잘 설득해볼게요. 비밀번호로 협상하면 되니까요.

1000641953.english: Hehe, ever since I came in here, I’ve wanted to visit that tower, so I guess I’ll finally be able to go.
1000641953.korean: 후후, 여기 들어오고나서부터 계속 저 탑에 가보고 싶었는데, 드디어 갈 수 있겠네요.

1000641954.english: Oh my? That tower, it looks like the light is getting stronger.
1000641954.korean: 어머? 저 탑, 빛이 더 강해지는 것 같은데요?
